text:
each digit of the value indicates which types of drugs are 
covered on this tier of the formulary. 
A tier may include multiple drug types. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Binary character string where each digit is a 1 or 0 to accommodate a variety of types of drugs; 
position 1 is the leftmost digit. For example, if the value = 110000 (1s in the 1st and 2nd digits), then 
generic and non-preferred brand drugs
